findings.message: Routes layer imports SessionLocal directly, bypassing the dependency injection pattern. SessionLocal should never be imported in route handlers.
findings.suggestion: Remove SessionLocal from the import; use the get_session dependency injection pattern (SessionDep) instead, as demonstrated in the get_items handler.

findings.message: Layering violation: create_item handler directly opens a session and manipulates the database, bypassing the repository layer. The repository module already provides a create_item function for this purpose.
findings.suggestion: Inject a session via SessionDep dependency and call the existing repository.create_item(session, payload.name) function, mirroring the pattern used in get_items.
